discovery.run_summary: Risk-on tape led by semis (SMH +2.6%, AVGO +5%, TSM +5.3%) on SK Hynix record memory profits, while VIX still ticked up 4% suggesting hedging into the rally. Mid-cap movers are dominated by single-name earnings dispersion — CALX sharp drop stands out, and sympathy moves in networking (EXTR) and supply chain software (MANH) warrant attention.

notable_index_moves: SMH +2.62% and TSM/AVGO +5% on SK Hynix record AI memory profits
ITA -1.77% notable divergence — defense weakness despite geopolitical tension (IEA 'biggest energy security threat in history')
VIX +4.2% rising alongside SPY +1% is unusual — suggests hedging into strength
XLF slightly red and KRE -0.55% lagging broad tape

discoveries.name: Calix, Inc
discoveries.mechanism: Likely earnings/guidance reaction given 4x volume and -14% single-day move; news feed does not include the specific release, so magnitude vs. content cannot be verified
discoveries.catalyst: Presumed Q1 earnings or guidance miss (not in provided news)
research_pointers: Pull Calix Q1 2026 earnings release and guidance vs. consensus
Check if BSP (Broadband Service Provider) deployment cadence is decelerating or if it was a one-quarter inventory issue
Compare to prior post-earnings drawdowns — CALX has history of sharp gaps that partially reverse
Check analyst note flow / price target revisions overnight
discoveries.what_would_falsify: A genuine structural guide-down (multi-quarter) with deteriorating gross margin trajectory would justify the move; a one-quarter timing issue with reaffirmed full-year would suggest overdone

discoveries.name: Extreme Networks
discoveries.mechanism: Possible sympathy selling with CALX (both networking/comm equipment) on fear of enterprise/service-provider capex read-through, against a tape where semis and software are ripping higher
discoveries.catalyst: No direct news; likely peer read-through from CALX plunge
research_pointers: Verify no EXTR-specific news (8-K, pre-announcement, insider sale)
Assess whether CALX's end-market (BSP/telco) overlaps enough with EXTR (enterprise campus/cloud) to justify contagion — arguably different customer bases
Check EXTR's own near-term earnings date
discoveries.what_would_falsify: An EXTR-specific negative catalyst (pre-announcement, downgrade) would make this rational rather than sympathy

discoveries.name: Manhattan Associates
discoveries.mechanism: +10.9% over 5 days plus 2x volume suggests earnings beat or guide raise — need to confirm catalyst before judging magnitude
discoveries.catalyst: Presumed Q1 results (not in provided news)
research_pointers: Pull MANH Q1 release — focus on cloud/subscription RPO growth and services margin
Check if guide raise was magnitude-meaningful or just beat-and-raise routine
MANH trades at premium multiple; confirm valuation expansion room
discoveries.what_would_falsify: If move is purely sector sympathy with no company-specific catalyst, pullback risk is elevated

discoveries.name: Best Buy
discoveries.mechanism: -4.6% on only 1.2x volume against a flat XLY is notable for a mid-cap retailer; could be tariff/consumer electronics read-through or analyst action
discoveries.catalyst: No direct news in feed; possibly tariff/Supreme Court tariff refund narrative (Trump post references $159B tariff decision) or consumer electronics demand concern
research_pointers: Check for BBY analyst downgrade or channel check note
Assess whether tariff decision (refunds to importers) is net positive or negative for BBY — refunds could help but forward tariff uncertainty hurts
Cross-check with other consumer electronics retailers for confirmation of sector move
discoveries.what_would_falsify: A clean analyst downgrade or negative channel check would confirm; absence + continued drift suggests opportunity

discoveries.name: Repligen
discoveries.mechanism: -6% against XBI +0.67% is a clear underperformer but only 1.2x volume — suggests no major news, possibly pre-earnings de-risking or single-desk flow
research_pointers: Check RGEN earnings date and buyside positioning
Look for bioprocessing peer commentary (Danaher, Sartorius) suggesting demand softness
discoveries.what_would_falsify: Confirmation of negative preannouncement from a bioprocessing peer

catalyst_chains.primary_event: SK Hynix record Q1 profit on AI memory demand

secondary_opportunities.relationship: supplier (semi cap equipment, including HBM-related processes)

trump_signals.post_summary: Trump criticized Supreme Court tariff ruling forcing $159B in tariff refunds to importers, and signaled concern about upcoming Birthright Citizenship ruling
trump_signals.note: Tariff refund ruling is theoretically a one-time cash benefit to large importers of record (retailers, electronics); however, Trump rhetoric signals potential new tariff actions to replace lost revenue, which would re-pressure import-heavy retailers. Net effect ambiguous — watch for administrative response (new Section 232/301 actions).

discovery.no_signals_note: Earnings catalysts for CALX and MANH are not in the provided news feed; confidence on those names is deliberately low pending Michael's verification of the actual release.

ai_announcements.headline: Google updates Workspace with AI (Workspace Intelligence, Gemini in Chrome, Gmail AI Overviews, Agent Platform)
ai_announcements.summary: Google Cloud Next 2026 announcements: AI-powered Workspace automation, Chrome as enterprise AI co-worker, Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform, AI Overviews in Gmail.

affected_stocks.counter_thesis: WEX fleet/payments workflow is specialized; AI agents could actually drive corporate spend automation that flows through WEX rails. Move likely not directly tied to Google news.
research_pointers: Check WEX for earnings/guidance catalyst separate from AI news
Confirm no direct Gemini/Workspace payments integration announced

ai_announcements.headline: Google Cloud launches two new AI chips (TPUs) to compete with Nvidia
ai_announcements.summary: Google announced next-gen TPUs positioned as faster and cheaper than prior generation, though still embracing Nvidia for now.

affected_stocks.counter_thesis: Veeco supplies semicap equipment (MOCVD, ion beam, laser annealing) used in advanced logic/HBM — more AI chip variants (TPU + Nvidia) = more fab capacity = more semicap tool demand. Counter-thesis IS the thesis.
research_pointers: Veeco exposure to TSMC/Samsung advanced nodes
HBM packaging tool orders
5-day move +18% suggests momentum, not new info

ai_announcements.headline: Broad enterprise AI agent rollout (Google Workspace/Chrome, OpenAI-Infosys)
ai_announcements.summary: Multiple announcements converging on enterprise AI agents automating white-collar and IT work.

affected_stocks.counter_thesis: Manhattan Associates supply chain/WMS software is sticky, deeply integrated. Move more likely earnings-driven (reports in this window historically) than AI news. AI agents need supply chain systems of record to act on — could be tailwind.
research_pointers: Verify MANH earnings date — likely the real catalyst
Not primarily AI-news driven

affected_stocks.counter_thesis: Calix serves broadband service providers with platform software — not displaced by Google Workspace AI. -14% on 4x volume points to earnings miss/guidance cut, not AI headlines.
research_pointers: Check CALX earnings release April 22-23
Not an AI-driven move — ignore for AI-selloff thesis
Falsifier: if no earnings catalyst exists, reconsider

affected_stocks.counter_thesis: Extreme Networks makes networking hardware — AI workloads increase networking demand. -5.8% likely earnings-related or sympathy with CALX in networking/comm-equipment space.
research_pointers: Check EXTR earnings timing
Possible sympathy selling with CALX — if so, could be OVERDONE but need to confirm no EXTR-specific news

affected_stocks.counter_thesis: Best Buy sells AI PCs, GPUs, consumer tech — AI cycle is a tailwind for hardware refresh. Selloff more likely tariff/consumer spending driven than AI news.
research_pointers: Check for retail/tariff macro news April 22-23
Not an AI-announcement-driven move

ai_analysis.no_signals_note: Most significant moves today (CALX -14%, EXTR -5.8%, MANH +5.9%, BBY -4.6%) appear driven by company-specific earnings/guidance rather than the AI announcements in the news feed. No clear AI-driven irrational selloff identified. RGEN (-6%) is healthcare/bioprocessing, unrelated to listed AI news. The Google Cloud Next announcements are incremental and broadly telegraphed — no obvious sympathy selloff to fade.
